verses.textCn: 起初，神创造天地。
verses.textEn: In the beginning God created the heavens and the earth.

verses.textCn: 地是空虚混沌，渊面黑暗；神的灵运行在水面上。
verses.textEn: Now the earth was formless and empty, darkness was over the surface of the deep, and the Spirit of God was hovering over the waters.

verses.textCn: 神说：'要有光'，就有了光。
verses.textEn: And God said, "Let there be light," and there was light.

verses.textCn: 神看光是好的，就把光暗分开了。
verses.textEn: God saw that the light was good, and he separated the light from the darkness.

verses.textCn: 神称光为'昼'，称暗为'夜'。有晚上，有早晨，这是头一日。
verses.textEn: God called the light "day," and the darkness he called "night." And there was evening, and there was morning—the first day.

verses.textCn: 天地万物都造齐了。
verses.textEn: Thus the heavens and the earth were completed in all their vast array.

verses.textCn: 到第七日，神造物的工已经完毕，就在第七日歇了他一切的工，安息了。
verses.textEn: By the seventh day God had finished the work he had been doing; so on the seventh day he rested from all his work.

verses.textCn: 神赐福给第七日，定为圣日；因为在这日，神歇了他一切创造的工，就安息了。
verses.textEn: Then God blessed the seventh day and made it holy, because on it he rested from all the work of creating that he had done.

verses.textCn: 亚伯拉罕的后裔，大卫的子孙（后裔，子孙：原文是儿子；下同），耶稣基督的家谱：
verses.textEn: This is the genealogy of Jesus the Messiah the son of David, the son of Abraham:

verses.textCn: 亚伯拉罕生以撒；以撒生雅各；雅各生犹大和他的弟兄；
verses.textEn: Abraham was the father of Isaac, Isaac the father of Jacob, Jacob the father of Judah and his brothers,

verses.textCn: 犹大从他玛氏生法勒斯和谢拉；法勒斯生希斯仑；希斯仑生亚兰；
verses.textEn: Judah the father of Perez and Zerah, whose mother was Tamar, Perez the father of Hezron, Hezron the father of Ram,

verses.textCn: 太初有道，道与神同在，道就是神。
verses.textEn: In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God.

verses.textCn: 这道太初与神同在。
verses.textEn: He was with God in the beginning.

verses.textCn: 万物是借着他造的；凡被造的，没有一样不是借着他造的。
verses.textEn: Through him all things were made; without him nothing was made that has been made.

verses.textCn: 生命在他里头，这生命就是人的光。
verses.textEn: In him was life, and that life was the light of all mankind.

verses.textCn: 光照在黑暗里，黑暗却不接受光。
verses.textEn: The light shines in the darkness, and the darkness has not overcome it.

verses.textCn: （大卫的诗。）耶和华是我的牧者，我必不致缺乏。
verses.textEn: The Lord is my shepherd, I lack nothing.

verses.textCn: 他使我躺卧在青草地上，领我在可安歇的水边。
verses.textEn: He makes me lie down in green pastures, he leads me beside quiet waters,

verses.textCn: 他使我的灵魂苏醒，为自己的名引导我走义路。
verses.textEn: he refreshes my soul. He guides me along the right paths for his name's sake.

verses.textCn: 我虽然行过死荫的幽谷，也不怕遭害，因为你与我同在；你的杖，你的竿，都安慰我。
verses.textEn: Even though I walk through the darkest valley, I will fear no evil, for you are with me; your rod and your staff, they comfort me.

verses.textCn: 在我敌人面前，你为我摆设筵席；你用油膏了我的头，使我的福杯满溢。
verses.textEn: You prepare a table before me in the presence of my enemies. You anoint my head with oil; my cup overflows.

verses.textCn: 我一生一世必有恩惠慈爱随着我；我且要住在耶和华的殿中，直到永远。
verses.textEn: Surely your goodness and love will follow me all the days of my life, and I will dwell in the house of the Lord forever.
